title: Pseudo Anonymised Contraceptive and HRT from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the contraceptive and HRT section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of use of contraceptives and HRT. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

R0_ContracepPillUse.x-question: Have you ever used the contraceptive pill?

R0_ContracepPill_Unknown.x-question: cannot remember the name of the contraceptive pill
R0_ContracepPill_Unknown.description: Participant's inability to recall pill name

R0_ContracepPill_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StartAge.description: Age when participant began this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_StopAge.description: Age when participant discontinued this contraceptive pill

R0_ContracepPill_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the contraceptive pill?
R0_ContracepPill_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this pill

ContracepPillExtra.description: Additional timing details for contraceptive pills 4-9

R0_ContracepPill_Start_Shifted.name: R0_ContracepPill_Start_Shifted
R0_ContracepPill_Start_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_ContracepPill_End_Shifted.name: R0_ContracepPill_End_Shifted
R0_ContracepPill_End_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised month/year. Month and year components are combined into a date with day 15, then shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year and month of the shifted date are stored. If the month component is missing (and a year is present) the date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of that year before shifting. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanThree.x-question: More than 3 episodes of contraceptive pill
R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanThree.description: Participant's indication of multiple contraceptive pill uses

R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanNine.x-question: More than 9 episodes of contraceptive pills
R0_ContracepPill_MoreThanNine.description: Participant's indication of extensive contraceptive pill use

R0_OtherHormonalContracep.x-question: Have you ever used any other type of hormonal contraception, such as contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch?
R0_OtherHormonalContracep.description: Participant's use of non-pill contraceptive methods

OtherContracep.description: Non-pill contraceptive methods used by participant

R0_OtherContracep_StartAge.x-question: At what age did you start using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StartAge.description: Age participant began this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_StopAge.x-question: At what age did you stop using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_StopAge.description: Age participant discontinued this contraceptive method

R0_OtherContracep_CurrentUse.x-question: Are you still using the contraception (contraception injected, implanted, or applied with a patch)?
R0_OtherContracep_CurrentUse.description: Participant's current usage status of this method

R0_OtherContracep_MoreThanTwo.description: Participant's indication of multiple contraceptive method uses

R0_HRT_Use.x-question: Have you ever had hormone replacement therapy (HRT)?
